sentence: That's not a very strong reaction.
Well, it's--it's not a very strong drink.
Ladies and gentlemen, the captain has turned on the "fasten seat belts" sign.
Please return to your seats and keep your seat belts fastened.
It's normal. My husband said the planes want to stay in the air.
You be sure and tell him that when he gets back from the bathroom.
Well, I'll keep you company until he does. Don't worry--
It's okay. You--you can let go.
Sorry about the unexpected bumps, folks. We just hit a pocket of rough air. It should be a smooth ride from here on out.
Remind me to hold it next time, will ya? I almost died in that bathroom.
Now I know how the laundry feels when it's in the dryer.
Oh, I'm sorry, mate. Is this your seat? The stewardess said it was empty.
No. No, I'm at the window.
Oh, right. Listen, mate, do you mind if I sit here? It's just the fella next to me has been snoring ever since we took off from Sydney.
No. No, you just... Do I know you from somewhere?
Nice to meet you, Jack... or to see you again.
I got you. No, don't let go!
Come on! Come on, you son of a bitch!
It's okay. It's me, miles. It's okay.
I can't--I can't hear you. Are your ears ringing?
No. That's the Swan hatch... after Desmond blew it up.
Jack? Jack. Can you hear me? Jack!

You were wrong! That's the damn Swan hatch--blown up just like we left it before we started jumping through time! You said we could stop it from ever gettin' built! That our plane would never crash on this Island!
You blew us right back where we started! Except Juliet's dead. She's dead, you son of a bitch, 'cause you were wrong.
Sawyer... I'm sorry. I thought we were supposed to... I thought it would work.
No, I'm just waiting for my friend.
Let's get back to our seats, sweetheart.
No. No knife and fork for you, honey.
What do you think I'm gonna do, stab you and run?
Hey, watch we're you're going, buddy.
Say it. Come on, please? Just once.
I really don't want to, dude.
I love those commercials. Come on. Just do the Australian accent, and I'll leave you alone.
All right. Fine. All right. Oi! Have a cluckity-cluck day, mate!
You know who this is? This is--this is the owner of Mr. Cluck's Chicken. And he's--and he's back here riding coach with the rest of us yutzes! Huh?
Hey, um, do you mind me asking, how exactly did a guy like you get to own a major corporation?
I won the lottery and I like chicken, so I bought it.
You know, you really shouldn't tell people you won the lottery.
Cause they'll take advantage of you. That's why not.
Thanks for the advice, dude, but it's not gonna happen.
Nope. Nothing bad ever happens to me. I'm the luckiest guy alive.
Dude, who cares? The sky just went from day to night. What happened?!
I think we moved through time.
White flash. Headache. Can't hear. Happened to me before.
What about Jack and everyone else? Did they move through time, too?
I don't know. They took one of the other vans and went up to the worksite.
You said that our plane would never crash on this Island!
You hear that, dude? It's Sawyer.
You think an atom bomb went off, we'd still be standing here?!
That's right! You don't! For once, you don't know!
With Hurley at the van. Two minutes away.
He's still bleeding. We don't know what to do.
So what do you say, doc? Got another great idea to save Sayid? Maybe there's a nuke laying around.
Oh, God. Oh, God, this is gross.
Don't worry, dude. Everything's gonna be fine.
When I die... what do you think will happen to me?
Just--just try not to talk, dude.
I've tortured more people than I can remember. I murdered. Wherever I'm going... it can't be very pleasant.
And I know how to shoot it!
Hello, Hugo. You got a minute?
You're wasting your time, man. This plane goes down in the ocean way out here, I think our chances of survival are exactly zero.
Actually, in calm seas w-with a good pilot, we could survive a water landing. And, uh, the fuel tanks are buoyant enough to keep us afloat until we got in the life rafts...
No, it's just impressive you know that. So what were you doing in Australia? Business or pleasure?
I went down to get my sister out of a bad relationship that it turns out she didn't want to get out of. So... here I am. So what, you were just Down Under for vacation?
Actually, I went on a walkabout.

No, not exactly. But--but, uh, it was pretty intense. We--we spent ten days in the Outback and, uh, nothing but our packs and our knives. We slept under the stars and made our own fires, hunted our own food.
Wow. I wouldn't make it two days without my cell phone.
You're not pulling my leg, are ya?
Why would I pull your leg?
This thing goes down, I'm sticking with you.
You can stop staring at the fire. Jacob's gone. He's gone.
Why didn't he fight back? Why did he let me just kill him?
I guess he knew that he was beaten. Ben... I want you to go outside and tell Richard that I need to talk to him.
No, that's not how it's gonna be.
You have to--you're not going in there.
Just back up a little. Okay?

Other than the fact that I know they were on the Ajira flight with us, all I know is they knocked me out and dragged my ass to some cabin, which they promptly burned, then... brought me here along with the dead guy in the box. They say they're the good guys.
Listen to me. Hey! Listen to me, and listen carefully. No one goes in there unless Jacob invites them in.
Richard, that's why we're here, because Jacob invited us.
Asking me what's in the shadow of the damn statue doesn't mean you're in charge.
Everything's fine. John wants to speak to you.
Well, of course Jacob's all right. They're both together inside. John just wants to talk to you.
John wants to talk to me?
Richard, what are you doing? I don't understand.
Well, I'm happy to talk to John. But before I do, maybe you should talk to him first.
If we can move this beam, I think I can get down there.
It's too heavy... we need something to pull it. Jin! The van. There's chains in it. Go get 'em!

Where you goin', dude? And what are you doin' here? I mean... I meet you in a taxi and you know everything about me and you give me a plane ticket which just so happens to get me back on this Island. How'd you know that was gonna happen?
Hello? Can you hear me? Why aren't you answering my questions?
Look, my friend Jin is gonna be here any second so you better stop ignoring--
Your friend Jin won't be able to see me.
Because I died an hour ago.
I was killed by an old friend who grew tired of my company.
You want me to do something crazy again, don't you?
No. I need you to save Sayid, Hugo.
Well that's why Jin went to go get Jack...
Jin can't help him. You need to take Sayid to the Temple. That's the only chance he's got. And the rest of them will be safe there.
The Temple? I'm supposed to know what that is?
Jin knows. Tell him to take you to the hole in the wall where he was with the French team. Through that opening you can get into the Temple. You still have that guitar case I gave you?
Hurley! Help me with Sayid. We have to get him into the van. Juliet needs our help.
Come on, we have to go!
Jin, if I asked you to take me to where there's, like, a hole in the wall... where you went with the French team... would you know what I was talkin' about?
Stop it! Stop, Sawyer! The van is here, the chains are coming.
She ain't makin' any more noises...
No, she knows we're here. She's probably just resting.
If she dies, I'll kill him.
Ladies and gentlemen, nothing to be alarmed about, but if there is a doctor onboard could you please press your call button?
Could you come with me please?
We appreciate your help. A passenger went into the restroom about half an hour ago and he's not responding when we knock.
This man's a doctor. If he's unconscious in there--"
Well, I think he tampered with the lock, it's... it's jammed or something, I don't know.
What's goin' on back there, Earheart?
Everything's fine sir, please just stay in your seats.
I need ya to hold this over his mouth... hold it there and do not let any air escape.
Somethings blocking his air passage. I'm gonna have to open it up. I need, uh, something sharp - a razor...
A pen! Just a pen. I had a pen in my jacket but it's gone. Damnit.
I got it, I got it. Relax, just relax, breathe.
Okay Jin! We're good down here! ...hit it!
Juliet! Okay...I'm comin... Juliet? Hey, I'm here, come on baby, come on wake up.
Don't worry about that. You're fine. I gotta get you outta here, okay?
It didn't work, we're still on the Island.
It's okay, It's okay, I just gotta get this loose enough to get you out, okay?
No, I hit the bomb and you're still here.
You what? ...You hit the bomb? Why?
I wanted you to be able to go home. I wanted to make it so you never came to this damn Island ...it didn't work.
Don't you worry about that. You're gonna be OK. I'm gonna get you outta here and we're all gonna go home together, you hear me?
Even if I could get the bullet out, bleeding won't stop, there's nothing I can do for him.
There's somethin' I can do. There's a temple, if we can get Sayid there we can save him.
This guy Jacob told me just before we got here.
Does it matter? Can you fix Sayid, Jack?
Then you're gonna have to let me do it.
Ben, you need to talk to me. I can't stop them unless you tell me what happened in there. What happened to Jacob.
You and I have known each other for 30 years Ben, I'm asking you this as a friend.
You wanna know what happened Richard? Why don't 'cha go inside and find out.
We're goin in, and he's comin' with us.
Then who is that behind you?

Don't worry about me. Let's talk about you. I'm assuming that you are, what? Jacobs bodyguards? And that you came all the way to this Island to protect him? Well I have good news, Jacob burned up, right there in that fire. Therefore there's nothing left for you to protect. You can go. You're free.
Kill him! Spread out! Get him! ...where is he?
I'm sorry you had to see me like that.
Okay, okay, I got'cha, I got'cha. Don't worry.
We can get coffee some time.
I gotta get you outta here.
I have to tell you something, it's really really important.
You tell me... you tell me...
Juliet? You tell me ...oh...oh my god
Should'a let that happen man, I was supposed to die.
Don't take it personally, some people just don't know how to say thanks.
Excuse me, do you know what happened to the guy that was sitting next to me?

Ladies and Gentlemen, captain Norris here, we're now beginning our final descent into Los Angeles international airport, I'm happy to tell you it's a beautiful day in Los Angeles, 72 degrees, 6 miles visibility and winds outta the south-west at 5 miles an hour.
I'll be putting on the fasten seat belt sign now, we'll be on the ground in just a few minutes, thank you so much for flying Oceanic Air.
Are we gonna sing Kum Ba Yah on the way?
Hey Miles, you mind hangin' back?
I'll make sure to leave a trail so you can follow us.
Oceanic passenger Jack Shephard, Jack Shephard, please go to the nearest courtesy desk.
Hi, uh, I'm Jack Shephard, I was just paged?
Oh, Mr. Shephard, hello, yes - that was me, uh, sorry I meant to meet you at the gate.
Mr. Shephard, I'm deeply sorry but there seems to have been a mix up involving the, uh, cargo you checked in Sydney.
I don't... ...I don't understand, I mean are you saying that it's not here?
It appears it was never put on the plane.
The funeral is in two hours - when is it getting here?
Mr. Shephard, I can't tell you how deeply sorry we are but we don't know when it will arrive, because we're not exactly sure where it is.
How're we gonna get him over the top?
We're not, we're bringing him in through here.
Who brings a book into a cave?
And why is his arm missing?
It was ripped off when he was attacked by the black smoke.
Well, this is gonna be awesome.
Kate! ... KATE! Can you hear me? Kate!
I need to go to the bathroom.
Sure you can kiddo I believe in you.
Anybody in here? Is anybody in the ladies room? Don't move. Okay, you got two minutes.
Alright times up! Get outta there.
No, open this door right now.
Yes you are, open it... Austen, I swear to god you don't open this door I'm commin in there.
He, he just walked in here and attacked me - I pushed him - I just, I need to get outta here.
Welcome aboard. We were on the same flight. Sydney.
We're on the south elevator headed to ground.
Get your asses to international baggage claim we got a 341.
Well if it's confidential how the hell am I supposed to know if I see one?
Hey, I think that'll do it boss.
Stop calling me boss. You ain't my deputy any more.
You got it. Are you thirsty? I think I saw some beers in the van. Construction guys hid 'em in the wa--
What'd she wanna tell me Miles?
Juliet. She said she wanted to tell me something, then she died. What was it Miles?
That's why you asked me to stay here with you?
You're the only one around that talks to dead people.
Jim, that's not how it works.
What did she wanna tell me Miles?
Just do it! Just ask her.
I know she's gone. I know. Now tell me.
What did she wanna tell me?
That's what she wanted to tell you. It worked.
Dare da omaetachi (誰だ 御前達―Who are you?)
I know who they are. They were on the first plane. Oceanic 815 along with me.
Karera wa koko e kurubekidewa nakatta Kono basyo wo mirukoto wa yurusaren Ute!
I said, Jacob sent us. He said, you would help our friend.
He wants you to prove it.
He gave me that guitar case!
Yoshi ikou! Keganin no Jarrah wo hakobe. Izumi ni tsureteiku (けが人のジャラーを運べ。泉に連れて行く―Bring the injured Jarrah. We're going to the spring.]
Pick him up - get him to the spring.
Hey, excuse me, I carried that case across the ocean and like, through time, so I wanna know what that paper says.
The paper said that if your friend there dies, we're all in a lot of trouble.
And what business are you in sir?
This letter says the watch is a business gift, can you tell me what business you're in?
문제 될 것 없는데... 보내 줄 수 없을까요? Meeting! 미팅 있어가지고 가야 돼요.
Step back sir. ...what are you doin' with this? Anything over 10 thousand dollars has to be declared ...you, didn't, declare this.
Sir, you're gonna have to come with me, let's go have a talk.
Ann, Take her to the waiting area.
Ms. Paik, do you understand any English? Because if you do, if this is just a misunderstanding, you should speak up now. Do you understand me?
The water isn't clear - what happened?
My fault, I didn't shoot him but it's my fault.
Dekiru kagiri no koto wa suruga, soreniha kiken ga tomonau
If we do this there are risks .. you understand?
Do what you have to do.
Kono otoko wo izumi no nakae
Take off the coveralls, put him in.
Can unconscious people hold their breath?
You're not saving him! You're drowning him!
Jack... Jack, stop, what are you doing?
He's not coming back, stop it!
Woah, woah, woah, I don't think so lady, there's a line. There's a line!
... Outback is just a name, you sayin' they own the entire outback? That's just stupid.
...she's gonna be coming outta customs I want you guys to take the other door.
Lady, I already have a customer.
Thought you might like a little something to eat or drink. Zach, Emma, then take the rest to the people over there.
They jumped us in the jungle - he took four of them out, before one of them hit him with a damn rock.
Kare ni kiitekure, Jacob wa seikaku ni nanto itta noka, donna shiji wo uketanoka
He wants to know what Jacob told you.
He told me to come here. Said you guys would save Sayid.
Wait a second - you're not translating anything I say to him - which means you totally understand me dude.
I don't like the way English tastes on my tongue.
Is he coming to the temple?
I really don't think that's gonna happen man.
Zenin haichi ni tsuke! Kabe no ue ni hai wo youi shiro
Everyone to your posts! On the walls, prepare the ash!
Kigashi no kabe ni shubi wo katamero! Juunin ha kita ni maware
Ten men on the north side!
Mina ni konokoto wo tsutaerunda, yoshi tenka!
Guess we're not getting outta here huh?
This isn't to keep you in, it's to keep him out.
Wh.. I'm not a what Ben, I'm a who.
Let's not resort to name calling.
You used me... you couldn't kill him yourself, so you made me do it.
I didn't make you do anything. You should know, he was very confused when you killed him.
I seriously doubt that Jacob was ever confused.

I'm not talking about Jacob. I'm talking about John Locke. Do you wanna know what he was thinking while you, choked the life outta him Benjamin? What the last thought that ran through his head was? "I don't understand". Isn't that just the saddest thing you ever heard? But it's fitting in a way, because when John first came to the Island, he was a very sad man. A victim, shouting at the world for being told what he couldn't do, even though they were right. He was weak, and pathetic, and irreparably broken. But, despite all that, there was something admirable about him. He was the only one of them that didn't wanna leave. The only one, who realized how pitiful the life he'd left behind actually was.
Well that's the great irony here Ben because, I want the one thing that John Locke didn't. I want to go home.
Goodbye dude, If you ever wanna talk, I'm around.
We got caught by the others again?
Yeah, only, this time they're protecting us, I think.
You know what you said back at the hatch, he's just tryin'a help us.
I ain't gonna kill Jack, he deserves to suffer on this rock just like the rest of us.

Yeah... I know...I ... do you think I knew this was gonna happen? I scheduled it so soon because I wanna get it over with. I don't know mom, he's not here so I can't tell you what to tell them other than we can't have the service without him. Yeah - I will call you if I hear anything.
Well, they lost one of my bags, what about you?
You wouldn't believe me if I told ya.
He died in Australia a couple days ago, and um, I flew down to get him.
Coffin was supposed to go on the plane in Sydney, but it didn't. Apparently he's somewhere in transit which is their way of saying, they have no idea where the hell he is.
They're the one's that checked him in, I mean they've gotta have some kind of tracking system.
No I'm not talking about the coffin, I mean how could they know where he is. They didn't lose your father, they just lost his body.
Either way, your story beats the hell outta mine - all that was in my suitcase was a bunch of knives. Thanks.
Yeah, something like that. Well it was nice talking to ya, hope ya find that coffin.
Mind if I ask what happened to ya? I'm sorry, I'm only asking because I'm a spinal surgeon, I didn't mean to...
Oh, no, don't worry about it - uh, uh surgery isn't gonna do anything to help me, my condition is irreversible.
Nothing is irreversible. Umm, if you ever wanna consult, just uh, gimme a call. - It's on the house.
Well thanks - Jack Shephard, I'm John - John Locke.
It's nice to meet ya John.
Don't shoot him! Don't shoot him!
I'm seein' it - But I'm still not believin' it.
Hello Richard. It's good to see you outta those chains.
I am very disappointed ... in all of you.
We need to speak to you privately.
If you've got something to say to me then say it, otherwise just leave me alone.

I don't think you're understanding me here, I'm asking politely, you either get up and come with us on your own, or I'll have ya dragged out. Because we are going to have this conversation and it's not going to be here.
